description: §60.2/§60.9 — a `${param}` in an endpoint path template with no corresponding request-shape field (here the path names `${id}` but the reqShape Q carries only `name`) fires E-API-PATH-PARAM-UNBOUND (typer, W3). Every `${param}` in the path SHALL be a field of the request shape.
rationale: §60.2: every `${param}` in the path template SHALL be a field of the request shape (the path-template parameter source). Q has `name`, not `id`, so `${id}` is unbound → E-API-PATH-PARAM-UNBOUND. The response is a variant, so the raw-boundary info-lint stays silent.
